en: In today's video we will learn how to pronounce the word
Let's break down the pronunciation into easy steps First we have the S
H sound like the S H in she or shoe
sh Next we have the R I M P sound rimp Notice that your
lips are rounded and come forward to make this sound r r
rimp Put it together shrimp The word stress is on the first syllable the S H sound
shrimp Here's a sentence example Tonight's dinner is shrimp and pasta That
wraps up our quick lesson on pronouncing the word shrimp
